title: GRAPHIS (More) Complete Collection Part II: 2009-2015 (v4)
description:
This is the v4 update, and makes [fairly extensive changes](https://snip.dssr.ch/?d02f65474b450461#8CNDFMpvjLfvGu1Bch3NGnJPjuYJZBZsMtZTEfGfeJeq). The [previous version](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/3812267) will not be seeded by me personally due to these changes, but for newer users it may be recommended *(depending on seeds)* to grab v3 and then follow the changelog before then updating to this v4 torrent.

---

This is **Part II** of the collection. For the other two, please see [Part I: 2002-2008 + Unsorted](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/4043286) and [Part III: 2016-Ongoing](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/4043344).

GRAPHIS is a gravure *(softcore)* website that's been around for quite some time. Previously, there was a siterip by someone else *(see  [#2969657](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/2969657))*, but as far as I can see it was actually NOT a siterip. It was some guy who DLed shit from XIDOL, IdolFile, and similar websites, and threw them into a torrent. Unfortunately, because of this there were duplicates, watermarked images inserted by IdolFile, missing content, general disorganization, and so on.

What I've done is actually get an account, organize everything by category/date of release/model/gallery title *(dates for the 2002-2004/5 era are sketchy due to what I suspect was GRAPHIS losing a server and reuploading content)*, and get all the content I could both from the website and from sources online *(when not available on the website)*. I've also deleted duplicate images and yada yada. The works.

There's still missing content, denoted by **(inc)** in the filename. If you have these galleries, please share them with me. Some of them *may* also be available via RapidGator and other sites; I found some of the missing ones were possibly still uploaded to them but required a Premium account. If you have one, please search them up and upload them for me to update the collection with.

Anyway, enjoy. There's a lengthier readme included in Part III's torrent if you'd like. If you find any typos in names or any disorganization of files, please let me know and I'll fix it in a v5.

title: GRAPHIS (More) Complete Collection Part I: 2002-2008 + Unsorted (v4)
description:
This is the v4 update, and makes [fairly extensive changes](https://snip.dssr.ch/?d02f65474b450461#8CNDFMpvjLfvGu1Bch3NGnJPjuYJZBZsMtZTEfGfeJeq). The [previous version](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/3914227) will not be seeded by me personally due to these changes, but for newer users it may be recommended *(depending on seeds)* to grab v3 and then follow the changelog before then updating to this v4 torrent.

---

This is **Part I** of the collection. For the other two, please see [Part II: 2009-2015](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/4043288) and [Part III: 2016-Ongoing](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/4043344).

GRAPHIS is a gravure *(softcore)* website that's been around for quite some time. Previously, there was a siterip by someone else *(see  [#2969657](https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/2969657))*, but as far as I can see it was actually NOT a siterip. It was some guy who DLed shit from XIDOL, IdolFile, and similar websites, and threw them into a torrent. Unfortunately, because of this there were duplicates, watermarked images inserted by IdolFile, missing content, general disorganization, and so on.

What I've done is actually get an account, organize everything by category/date of release/model/gallery title *(dates for the 2002-2004/5 era are sketchy due to what I suspect was GRAPHIS losing a server and reuploading content)*, and get all the content I could both from the website and from sources online *(when not available on the website)*. I've also deleted duplicate images and yada yada. The works.

There's still missing content, denoted by **(inc)** in the filename. If you have these galleries, please share them with me. Some of them *may* also be available via RapidGator and other sites; I found some of the missing ones were possibly still uploaded to them but required a Premium account. If you have one, please search them up and upload them for me to update the collection with.

Anyway, enjoy. There's a lengthier readme included in Part III's torrent if you'd like. If you find any typos in names or any disorganization of files, please let me know and I'll fix it in a v5.
